# CardSensei

> CardSensei is a free online multiplayer card game platform where players can play Bridge, Israeli Whist, and War in their browser or on mobile. No download or signup required.

## Games Available

- [Bridge](https://sensei-apps-website.pages.dev/cards): Classic contract Bridge with full bidding and trick-play mechanics. Play with friends online or against AI bots.
- [Israeli Whist](https://sensei-apps-website.pages.dev/cards): Strategic trick-taking card game popular in Israel with ascending and descending bid rounds. Multiplayer with room codes.
- [War](https://sensei-apps-website.pages.dev/cards): Quick and simple card game of chance. Great for beginners and casual play.

## Key Features

- Free to play with no ads, subscriptions, or in-app purchases
- Real-time online multiplayer — create a room and share the code with friends
- AI bot opponents for solo practice and learning
- Works in any modern web browser — no download required
- Native mobile apps available on iOS and Android
- Supports 1 to 4 players depending on the game
- Game history tracking to review past hands

## How to Play

1. Visit CardSensei at https://sensei-apps-website.pages.dev/cards
2. Choose a game: Bridge, Israeli Whist, or War
3. To play with friends: Create a room and share the room code
4. To play solo: Start a game with AI bot opponents
5. No account or signup needed — just pick a display name and play

## About

CardSensei is built for card game enthusiasts who want a fast, free way to play classic card games online with friends or practice against AI. The platform focuses on trick-taking games and provides a clean, distraction-free experience across all devices.

## Platform Availability

- Web: https://sensei-apps-website.pages.dev/cards (all modern browsers)
- iOS: Available on the App Store
- Android: Available on Google Play

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is CardSensei free?
A: Yes, completely free. No subscriptions, no in-app purchases, no ads.

Q: Do I need to create an account?
A: No. Just open the site, pick a name, and start playing.

Q: Can I play with friends?
A: Yes. Create a multiplayer room and share the room code. Friends join using that code.

Q: What is Israeli Whist?
A: Israeli Whist is a trick-taking card game popular in Israel. Players bid on how many tricks they will win across ascending and descending rounds. It is strategic and supports 2-4 players.

Q: Can I play against AI?
A: Yes. All games support AI bot opponents for solo practice and learning.

Q: Does it work on my phone?
A: Yes. CardSensei works in mobile browsers and has native iOS and Android apps.
